name: multi_consumer
description: One None source (get_username returns None) flows to two attribute consumer sites. Tests feedback dedup: one ShapedFeedback with two AffectedConsumers, not two separate findings.
analysis_note: get_username: base_return=Nullable. render_user: name=Nullable. Consumer(name, Attribute) emitted twice (name.upper() and name.center()). DiffKey ordinals distinguish them; shape_feedback groups by root cause into one finding with two consumers.
task: render_user() calls get_username() which returns None (user not found). The result is used without a None check in two places: name.upper() and name.center(). Fix both dereferences.
